items.checkin_comment: Crisp tasty triple with a bit of a kick, though it doesn’t taste like a kick
Again, truly great representation of a Belgian tripel. These guys are on fire!!

user.bio: Travel for both business and pleasure. Very fortunate to have had some amazing beers around the world.
Constantly searching for new beers, no point stopping now?!

items.badge_name: Dubbel, Tripel and Quad Oh My! (Level 6)
items.badge_description: Dubbel, Tripel, or Quad, you can’t go wrong with these amazing feats of Belgian style brewing. Whether you’re looking for something light and golden or dark and boozy, one of these will do the trick! That's 30 different beers with the style of Dubbel, Tripel or Quad! Try 5 more for Level 7!
